extraction_reasoning: The litigation table reports criminal, tax and statutory/regulatory proceedings separately: against the Company, subsidiaries, Directors and Promoters, all criminal and statutory/regulatory cells are Nil, while the subsidiaries have 12 tax proceedings; all “By” rows were excluded, and promoter/director tax matters were excluded from the tax count. For the group amount, the Company-against amount is Nil and the subsidiaries-against amount is ₹74.69 million; ₹74.69 million was converted to ₹7.469 crore, while promoter/director amounts and all “By” amounts were excluded. The contingent-liabilities-and-commitments table is dated June 30, 2023 and has no stated Total row, so its three disclosed components—₹47.22 million, ₹272.71 million and ₹1,377.07 million—were summed to ₹1,697.00 million and converted to ₹169.70 crore. The only percentages disclosed concern channels, materials, advertisements, related-party transactions and other segment or operational metrics, not company-wide top-five or top-ten customer revenue concentration for a full fiscal year; the source monetary tables use ₹ millions, converted to crore by dividing by 10.
